# Nebula’s Best Autoflower Seeds of 2026 (Fast, Potent, High Yields)
_Last updated Jan 02, 2026_
by Nebula Haze
It’s 2026, and there’s never been a better time to grow with autoflower cannabis seeds. Why? New auto-flowering strains grow**fast harvests of top-shelf buds**. View our list of [recommended autoflower breeders](https://www.growweedeasy.com/2026-guide-to-cannabis-auto-flowering-strains#recommended-auto-flowering-breeders-2026) and [best autoflower seeds of 2026](https://www.growweedeasy.com/2026-guide-to-cannabis-auto-flowering-strains#recommended-auto-flowering-strains-2026).
Back: [OG Kush Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/original-og-kush-auto-feminised-seeds-fb-ogk-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64), [White Widow XXL Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/white-widow-xxl-auto-feminised-seeds-bfs-wwxxl-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64), [Zkittlez Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/zkittlez-autoflower.html#grower).  
Front: [Critical Orange Punch](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/critical-orange-punch-auto-feminised-seeds-dp-critical-orange-punch-auto?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64), [Alaskan Purple](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/alaskan-purple-auto-feminized-seeds-sman-alpurp-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64), [Pink Kush CBD](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/pink-kush-cbd-301-auto-feminized-seeds-sman-pink-cbd-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/autoflowering-cannabis-plants-harvest-the-gang-is-all-here.jpg)
Check our recent [autoflower grow journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nebulas-auto-flowering-cannabis-grow-journal) (above are those 6 autoflowering plants, just before harvest, at **80 days from germination**).
Autoflower cannabis plants are like **houseplants on steroids**. Unlike standard [photoperiod](https://www.growweedeasy.com/photoperiod-vs-auto-flowering-cannabis-strains) cannabis strains, autoflower cannabis seeds grow plants that are simpler-to-grow and ready to harvest just 2-3 months from germination. For home growers, auto seeds are the best choice for a [perpetual harvest](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-never-run-out-of-weed-the-perpetual-harvest).
Autoflower cannabis plants grow smaller plants on average. From left to right: [Blue Dream Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/blue-dream-auto-3/ref/63951/), [Critical Kush Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/critical-kush-auto/ref/63951/), [Sour Diesel Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/sour-diesel-auto-feminised-seeds-bfs-sd-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64), and [Black Jack Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/black-jack-autoflower.html#grower).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/4-autoflowering-plants-under-window.jpg)
**What are cannabis autoflowering seeds?** Autoflowering cannabis plants tend to stay small and most plants from autoflower seeds are ready to harvest in 2-3 months. Some seeds grow even faster, for example [Fastbuds autoflowering seeds](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/cannabis-seed-breeders/fastbuds-seeds?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) are often ready to harvest in just 2 months from germination.
Autoflower cannabis seeds make buds (“flowers”) automatically. Check out my [recent autoflower journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nebulas-auto-flowering-cannabis-grow-journal). This [Zkittlez Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/zkittlez-autoflower.html#grower) was my favorite.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/zkittlez-auto-cannabis-plant-just-before-harvest-growweedeasy-com-sm.jpg)
Autoflowering strains are ready to harvest several months sooner than standard (photoperiod) cannabis strains. Autos have another cool advantage for indoor growers. While photoperiod strains need daily [dark periods](https://www.growweedeasy.com/light-schedules) to start making buds, autoflowering strains start making buds/flowers automatically after a few weeks (“autoflower” stands for automatic flowering). This simplifies the home grow process because marijuana growers don’t need to put grow lights on a timer or think about light leaks.
Harvest day (from my recent [autoflower grow journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nebulas-auto-flowering-cannabis-grow-journal)).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/autoflowering-cannabis-plants-harvest-the-gang-is-all-here.jpg)
Autoflowering plants usually don’t get enormous due to their short lifespan, but they can produce multiple ounces of bud per plant when grown in optimal conditions with lots of strong light.
This [Ultimate Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/ultimate-auto-feminised-seeds-dp-ultimate-auto?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) in a 2-gallon fabric pot was harvested 65 days from germination and produced almost 4 ounces of prime bud on one plant.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/ultimate-auto-in-2-gallon-container.jpg)
Those [Ultimate Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/ultimate-auto-feminised-seeds-dp-ultimate-auto?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) cannabis buds at harvest.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/ultimate-auto-harvest-about-to-be-trimmed.jpg)
[Blackberry Kush Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/blackberry-kush-auto/ref/63951/) is a smooth pleasant strain, and nearly all autoflowering plants grow deep purple buds.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/pink-kush-cbd-purple-buds.jpg)
Why autoflowering strains are a great option for growing cannabis:
  * **Grows like a regular house plant (on steroids)** – Just germinate the seed and keep plants alive until harvest. Voila, you’ve got buds! Auto-flowering plants don’t need special light periods to make buds like photoperiod strains. Even a sunny window can produce a few grams of buds from an autoflower plant. However, it’s important to remember that light is the plant’s “food”. More light equal more buds (up to a point) and you need more than a sunny window to produce a lot of weed. One of the best options for home growers to produce multiple ounces of bud per plant is a cannabis-specific [LED grow light](https://www.growweedeasy.com/5-best-led-grow-lights-2025-cannabis-yields-speed-bud-quality).
  * **Ready to harvest in 2-3 months** – While standard photoperiod strains typically take 3-5 months from seed to harvest, autoflowering strains are ready to harvest in just 2-3 months from germination.
  * **More harvests per year** – The ability for a 2-month grow period let you harvest up to 6 times a year compared to 3-4 harvests a year with photoperiod strains.
  * **Hundreds of strains to choose from** – There are auto-flowering strains with almost any combination of THC and CBD to suit your personal needs. There are also autoflower versions of popular and legendary strains.

Cons to auto-flowering strains
  * **Reduced strain choice** – Auto-flowering strains _do_ have lots of options, but they are a relatively new (and boutique) type of cannabis so there are not as many options as photoperiod strains. You also need to be extra careful who you buy autoflower seeds from because some breeders sell questionable autoflower genetics.
  * **Plants stay small if you run into major problems** – An auto-flowering plant gains its full size within about 6 weeks from germination, then the plant stops growing any bigger and focuses all its energy on fattening buds. This short growing period means a plant may stay small forever if it gets stunted during the first 4-6 weeks of life. This is opposed to photoperiod strains which need dark periods to start making buds, which gives you as much time as you want to grow plants to the desired size.
  * **No advanced training techniques** – Plant training techniques like [manifolding](https://www.growweedeasy.com/manifold) or [schwazzing](https://www.growweedeasy.com/schwazzing-cannabis) aren’t suitable for autoflower seeds due to the shorter grow period.

Want to give auto-flowering strains a try in 2026? Continue reading this article to learn how to grow autoflower seeds so they produce potent, high-quality weed.
Autoflowering cannabis plants stay very small when grown in small pots with a small grow light.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/mini-tent-hlg-100-led-grow-light.jpg)
Autoflowering plants get much bigger when given plenty of light plus room for plants and roots to spread out. A 2’x4′ grow tent can produce up to 1 pound of cannabis if you fill it with auto-flowering plants.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/autoflowering-plants-under-250w-hps.jpg)
The final size / yields of auto-flowering plants is determined by their genetics, their care (how well you treat them), and how much light they get. These plants were the same strain, but the smaller plant was grown under a much less powerful grow light.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/topped-properly-vs-topped-too-late-autoflowering-plants.jpg)
If you give your auto-flowering plants water, nutrients, and a good environment, you can produce a surprising amount of bud in 2-3 months.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/fat-autoflowering-buds-close-to-harvest.jpg)
The biggest downside to autoflower seeds is if you run into problems early on, plants may [stay stunted and small](https://www.growweedeasy.com/why-did-my-autoflowering-plant-stay-so-small). That can dramatically reduce yields since a small plant can’t support a lot of buds.
Here’s an example of an auto-flowering plant that was overwatered as a seedling and stayed small. At 6 weeks old, it stopped growing any taller and was only a few inches tall at harvest.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2013/03/sick-autoflower-marijuana-stunted.jpg)
## Can You Grow Autoflower Seeds in a Window?
Autoflower cannabis strains are kind of like a regular houseplant in their care, except they need much more light and nutrients.
A long as you keep an autoflower plant alive and healthy (and ensure it gets several hours of bright light every day) it will produce buds that are ready to harvest in 2-3 months.
An autoflower plant in a window can be a fun way to get started growing weed without investing in a grow light.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/auto-flowering-window-plant.jpg)
Even a window auto-flowering plant can produce a few grams if you take care of it.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/solo-cup-plant-in-sunny-window-with-adorable-cat.jpg)
The above plant produce 3.5 g after being grown in a sunny window.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/harvest-solo-cup-window-plant.jpg)
In contrast, a photoperiod strain can’t be grown in a window because it needs 12-hour dark periods every day for 8-12 weeks in order to make buds. A photoperiod plant that gets light during its dark period will [re-veg](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-plant-problems/accidental-re-vegging), which makes buds wither away and die.
_Side Note Based on the Cat in Picture:_ Never leave a dog or cat alone with a cannabis plant or you may find nibbles on the leaves. Cannabis leaves are generally well-tolerated by cats or dogs (and some pets find cannabis leaves calming), but pets can harm or knock over your plants. This particular cat (my calico) will methodically take a bite out of every leaf if left alone with a plant for even a second.
Many cats and dogs love eating cannabis leaves. I collect extra leaves and let my kitty nibble on them 🙂
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/best-kitty-ever-eating-leaf-gif.gif)
## What Autoflower Seeds Should You Get?
If you want to get great results with auto-flowering cannabis seeds, you must choose great genetics. Autoflower seeds were developed from cross-breeding a type of hemp and the first commercial strain (called “Lowryder”) was released in the 2000s. In the beginning, all autoflower plants buds were small and grew relatively non-potent buds compared to their photoperiod counterparts.
All auto-flowering plants descend from the humble _Ruderalis_ cannabis plant from northern Siberia. These tiny hemp plants developed the auto-flowering characteristic as an adaptation to the short 2-month summers near the arctic circle. Cannabis breeders have crossed these hemp plants with standard cannabis strains to create autoflower strains that produce potent fat sticky buds.
These adorable _Ruderalis_ hemp plants are the ancestors of all auto-flowering strains.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/wild-ruderalis-russia.jpg)
Dedicated growers have slowly created auto-flowering strains that produce buds as big and potent as photoperiod strains. As of 2026, many auto-flowering buds match or in some cases even exceed the quality of photoperiod buds.
However, due to this breeding history, there is incredible variation between the worst and best auto-flowering strains. Unfortunately, some breeders still sell older or subpar genetics. It’s especially important when ordering auto-flowering strains to choose a trustworthy breeder that uses modern auto-flowering genetics. Here are some examples of trustworthy breeders and auto-flowering strains.
##  Recommended Autoflower Seed Breeders in 2026
There are many great breeders, but this list is based on my personal experience. These are the breeders I have ordered my auto-flowering seeds from so far for my grows in 2026.
[**Fast Buds Seeds** ](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/cannabis-seed-breeders/fastbuds-seeds?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64)
Ships from the US (specifically Maine) through this link. A long time auto-flowering breeder, their auto-flowering seeds grow fast and get consistent results. Great bud quality, nice looking buds, and most strains are ready to harvest just 2 months from seed. Fastest autos you can find without sacrificing quality.
Noteworthy Fast Buds Autoflowering Seeds:
  * [Blue Dream Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/blue-dream-auto/ref/63951/) (aka Blue Dream’matic auto)
  * [Gorilla Cookies Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/gorilla-cookies-auto/ref/63951/)
  * [Purple Lemonade Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/purple-lemonade-auto-feminised-seeds-fb-purplem-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64)

[](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/cannabis-seed-breeders/fastbuds-seeds?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64)
[**Seed Supreme**](https://seedsupreme.com/autoflowering-seeds.html#grower)
Also ships from US. A great variety of excellent modern genetics adapted into stabilized auto-flowering seed form. They are much more likely to offer the strains you’ve heard about/are looking for by name, while Fast Buds only carries their specific strains. They have a germination guarantee and good customer service. Their auto-flowering strains tend to be high-yielding.
Noteworthy Seed Supreme Autoflowering Seeds:
  * [Girl Scout Cookies Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/girl-scout-cookies-autoflower.html#grower)
  * [Purple Sunset Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/purple-sunset-autoflower-cannabis-seeds.html#grower) by i49 Seeds (made in partnership with Seed Supreme)
  * [Blueberry x Big Bud Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/blueberry-x-big-bud-autoflower.html#grower)

[](https://seedsupreme.com/autoflowering-seeds.html#grower)
[**ILGM Seeds**](https://ilgm.com/collections/autoflowering-seeds?aff=6207)
ILGM (I Love Growing Marijuana) has an extensive library of both famous and unique strains, all stabilized and bred in-house by ILGM. You can count on their seeds to germinate well, be easy to grow, and produce excellent bud quality. In our [grow forum](https://forum.growweedeasy.com/), ILGM may be the crowd favorite for auto-flowering strains.
Noteworthy ILGM Autoflowering Seeds:
  * [Blue Dream Auto](https://ilgm.com/products/blue-dream-autoflower-seeds?aff=6207)
  * [Granddaddy Purple Auto](https://ilgm.com/products/granddaddy-purple-autoflower-seeds?aff=6207)
  * [Super Skunk Auto](https://ilgm.com/products/super-skunk-autoflower-seeds?aff=6207)

[](https://ilgm.com/collections/autoflowering-seeds?aff=6207)
**10 More Excellent Auto-Flowering Cannabis Breeders**
I’ve ordered auto seeds from these breeders in the past and had great experiences.
  * [**Bomb Seeds**](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product-category/seeds/ace-seeds/bomb-seeds-autoflowering/ref/63951/) – I especially like their [THC Bomb Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/thc-bomb-auto/ref/63951/) for both yields and potency.
  * [**DNA Genetics**](https://dnagenetics.com/product-category/autoflower-seeds/?a_aid=42031) – A bit pricey, but they are a great choice if you want to get photoperiod-looking bud quality with auto-flowering strains. My favorite auto from them is [Purple People Eater Auto](https://dnagenetics.com/product/purple-people-eater-auto-seeds/?a_aid=42031).
  * [**Dutch Passion**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/cannabis-seed-breeders/dutch-passion-seeds?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) – XL yields on many auto seeds, though not necessarily the highest potency on their auto plants. I had especially great results with their [Critical Orange Punch Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/critical-orange-punch-auto/ref/63951/) and [Cinderella Jack Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/cinderella-jack-auto/ref/63951/).
  * [**Ethos Genetics**](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product-category/seeds/ethos-genetics/ethos-genetics-autos/ref/63951/) – Ethos also specializes in photoperiod strains but has been extensively working on their auto-flowering line since 2020. Not the quickest-to-harvest auto-flowering strains, as they typically take almost 3 months from germination to harvest (that seems fast, but some breeders like [Fast Buds](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/cannabis-seed-breeders/fastbuds-seeds?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) make autoflowering strains that take as little as 2 months from seed to harvest). However, Ethos offers some of the best smell and bud potency for autoflowering strains. I think of Ethos strains as “sparkly potent smelly genetics” whether it’s their photoperiod or autoflowering genetics. Noteworthy strains include [Pineapple Runtz Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/pineapple-runtz-auto-feminised-seeds-etho-piru-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64), [Pluto Cut Auto R F3](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/pluto-cut-autoflower-r-f3/ref/63951/), and [Banana Daddy Auto RBX2](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/banana-daddy-r-bx2/ref/63951/).
  * [**G13 Labs**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/cannabis-seed-breeders/g13-labs?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64&customFilters=seeds_flowering_type:1367) – They’ve been in the auto-flowering game for a while and have some real winners in their strain library, especially [Pineapple Express Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/pineapple-express-auto-feminised-seeds-5-g13l-aupe-fem-5?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64). They captured magic with that strain!
  * [**Happy Valley Genetics**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/breeders/happy-valley-genetics?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64&customFilters=seeds_flowering_type:1367) – A recent top breeder in the world of autoflower seeds. This breeder started out as a dispensary in Massachusetts, then started breeding their own strains so they could offer better weed. After winning a bunch of cannabis cups, they began specifically breeding both photoperiod and autoflower seeds aimed at home growers. Their photos are great (I especially love [Candy Games #38](https://seedsupreme.com/candy-games-38-feminized-cannabis-seeds.html#grower)), but I feel like their auto seeds are where they really shine. Not the biggest yields, but some of the highest bud quality you can get (or at least, the best “bag appeal”).
  * [**MSNL Seeds**](https://www.marijuana-seeds.nl/auto-flowering-seeds?aw_affiliate=eyJjYW1wYWlnbl9pZCI6IjYiLCJ0cmFmZmljX3NvdXJjZSI6ImJlc3RhdXRvYnJlZWRlcnNwZyIsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOjE2MX0) – This seed source is based out of the Netherlands, so it tends to arrive fast in Europe, but may take 1-2 extra weeks to reach cannabis growers the US. MSNL only carries their own strains, so the strain selection isn’t huge, but the company is run by a geneticist and their strains have tons of excellent information about them when it comes to effects, potency, yields, grow patterns, etc. My favorite auto strain by them is [Kushberry Moonrocks Autoflower](https://www.marijuana-seeds.nl/kushberry-moonrocks-autoflower-seeds?aw_affiliate=eyJjYW1wYWlnbl9pZCI6IjYiLCJ0cmFmZmljX3NvdXJjZSI6Im5vX3NvdXJjZSIsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOjE2MX0).
  * [**Mephisto Genetics**](https://northatlanticseed.com/product-category/seeds/mephisto/ref/63951/) – Mephisto has been developing great auto-flowering strains since 2012 (one of the first great auto-flowering breeders), and continue to add new strains regularly. Great germination rates, maybe some of the best. I always get outstanding results. My personal favorite strain I’ve grown from them is [Creme de la Chem Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/creme-de-la-chem-auto/ref/63951/).
  * [**Seedsman**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/cannabis-seed-breeders/seedsman?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64&customFilters=seeds_flowering_type:1367) – They run an online seed store that sells strains from many different breeders, but also breed their own in-house strains. I’ve found the Seedsman-branded auto seeds tend to have excellent germination and growth rates, and buds always come out looking like photoperiod strains. I like that they offer some genetics that were developed in other parts of the world like Europe and Africa, which offers genetics that can otherwise be hard to get within the US. My favorite auto seeds from them are [White Widow Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/white-widow-auto-feminized-seeds-auto-white-widow?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) and [Alaskan Purple Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/alaskan-purple-auto-feminized-seeds-sman-alpurp-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) (my Alaskan Purple didn’t turn purple but the bud effects were excellent, [check out the grow journal](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nebulas-auto-flowering-cannabis-grow-journal)).
  * [**Sweet Seeds**](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product-category/seeds/sweet-seeds/sweet-seed-autos/ref/63951/?orderby=popularity) – Colorful strains with relaxing effects and delicious flavors. This breeder is located in Spain and therefore they offer different genetics from pretty much anywhere else. They seem to focus more on how buds make you feel (creative, relaxed, sedated, etc.) as opposed to massively high THC percentages. I like these buds for chill, relaxation time. [Black Cream Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/black-cream-auto/ref/63951/) may be my favorite.

Check out my recent [autoflower grow journal!](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nebulas-auto-flowering-cannabis-grow-journal) Here was the harvest.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/autoflowering-cannabis-plants-harvest-the-gang-is-all-here.jpg)
##  Best Autoflower Seeds (Feminized Seeds Only!) in 2026
**_Note:_ What are feminized seeds?** Feminized seeds (whether autoflower or photoperiod) grow 100% bud-making female plants. Perfect for how growers. With “regular” (non-feminized) seeds, half of the plants are male and don’t make buds. I highly recommend every home grower start with feminized seeds to make like a lot simpler. Every plant grows buds. So convenient and straightforward!
[Learn more: Feminized seeds? Are they worth it?](https://www.growweedeasy.com/feminized-cannabis-seeds-are-they-worth-it-pros-and-cons)
**5 Most Potent Autoflowering Strains in 2026** – High THC (25% or higher)
These autos have extremely high potency with strong physical and mental effects. All ready to harvest in under 3 months.
  1. [**Girl Scout Cookies Auto**](https://seedsupreme.com/girl-scout-cookies-autoflower.html#grower) by Seed Supreme – Ready in 75 days, THC above 25%. Sweet, lemony smelling buds. Ships from the US.
  2. [**Kushberry Moonrocks Autoflower**](https://www.marijuana-seeds.nl/kushberry-moonrocks-autoflower-seeds?aw_affiliate=eyJjYW1wYWlnbl9pZCI6IjYiLCJ0cmFmZmljX3NvdXJjZSI6Im5vX3NvdXJjZSIsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOjE2MX0) by MSNL – Over 25% THC, ready to harvest in about 80 days, big yields. Ships from Europe.
  3. [**Lemon Cherry Cookies Auto**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/lemon-cherry-cookies-auto-feminised-seeds-fb-lemche-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) by Fastbuds – Can be harvested in as little as 60 days, but leave it to about 75 days to maximize the potency, which can reach up to 28% THC. Ships from US.
  4. [**Gorilla Cookies Auto**](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/gorilla-cookies-auto/ref/63951/) by Fastbuds – Ready in just 70-80 days, over 25% THC, and sweet smelling buds with candy notes. A creative “up” kind of high that you feel in your body. Ships from US.
  5. [**Pluto Cut Auto R F3**](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/pluto-cut-autoflower-r-f3/ref/63951/) by Ethos Genetics – Over 25% THC plus about 5% other more exotic cannabinoids for a total cannabinoid content around 30%. Feels _very_ potent, strong body effects. Tends to stay relatively short, with excellent yields. Ready in 80 days. Ships out of the US.

[Pluto Cut Auto R F3](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/pluto-cut-autoflower-r-f3/ref/63951/) by Ethos Genetics is one of the most potent autoflowering strains available in 2026. Ships from the US.
[](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/pluto-cut-autoflower-r-f3/ref/63951/)
**3 Fastest Auto-flowering Strains in 2026 (Under 2 months!)**
Ready to harvest in less than 2 months. Two of these are from the breeder [Fastbuds](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/cannabis-seed-breeders/fastbuds-seeds?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64), which has some of the fastest auto-flowering strains (yet still focus on bud quality and yield).
  1. [**Banana Purple Punch Auto**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/banana-purple-punch-auto-feminised-seeds-fb-banpp-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) by Fastbuds – Ready in 56 days from germination, big yields especially for the timeline.
  2. [**Blackberry Auto**](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/blackberry-auto/ref/63951/) by Fastbuds – As little as 56 days from sprout, purple buds, great smell, excellent yields.
  3. [**LSD Auto**](https://seedsupreme.com/lsd-autoflower-cannabis-seeds.html#grower) by i49 Seeds – Kind of a bombastic name, but the strain is a potent choice for growers who want high-quality buds. Just 60 days to harvest with great yields.

The [Blackberry Auto](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/blackberry-auto/ref/63951/) I grew from Fastbuds. Smelled like fruit!
[](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/blackberry-auto/ref/63951/)
**2026 Autoflowering Genetics with Huge Yields**
These strains tends to produce bigger, longer buds than the others on this list, which tends to give them the biggest yields for autos.
  1. [**Blueberry x Big Bud Auto**](https://seedsupreme.com/blueberry-x-big-bud-autoflower.html#grower) – Both Blueberry and Big Bud strains produce large yields, and this gets the best of both.
  2. [**Cinderella Jack Auto**](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/cinderella-jack-auto/ref/63951/) – Grows tight, dense buds with strong bud effects and excellent yields.
  3. [**Haze XL Auto**](https://seedsupreme.com/haze-xl-autoflower.html#grower) – Grows big plants with huge yields.
  4. [**Pineapple OG Auto**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/pineapple-og-auto-feminised-seeds-sman-pineog-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) – Makes buds that are fat and plump with sweet undertones!
  5. [**Ultimate Auto**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/ultimate-auto-feminised-seeds-dp-ultimate-auto?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) – Best yields I’ve ever gotten from an auto-flowering strain, though not the highest potency.

Can’t beat the yields of [Ultimate Auto](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/ultimate-auto-feminised-seeds-dp-ultimate-auto?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) – Here’s the last time I grew it!
[](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/ultimate-auto-feminised-seeds-dp-ultimate-auto?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64)
**3 Best “Pretty Buds” Auto-flowering Strains in 2026 (High Bag Appeal)**
These are ready to harvest in 3 months or less, for those who want buds that look incredible in pictures with appealing smells.
  * [**Purple Sunset Auto**](https://seedsupreme.com/purple-sunset-autoflower-cannabis-seeds.html#grower) by i49 Seeds – Ready in 70 days, purple-tinted buds that grow in tight nugs, beautiful potency and strong effects that tend to last.
  * [**Pineapple Runtz Auto**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/pineapple-runtz-auto-feminised-seeds-etho-piru-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) by Ethos Genetics – Around 22% THC with an assortment of other cannabinoids. Starburst sweet smell. Gorgeous sparkly buds.
  * [**Purple Lemonade Auto**](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/purple-lemonade-auto/ref/63951/) by FastBuds – Super purple buds, citrus smell, excellent yields, ready to harvest 60-70 days from germination (wait until the full 70 days for the best potency of about 22% THC). Feels potent.

It’s hard to beat the smell, looks, and just overall high-quality impression of buds from [Purple Lemonade Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/purple-lemonade-auto/ref/63951/) by Fast Buds
[](https://northatlanticseed.com/product/purple-lemonade-auto-2/ref/63951/)
**3 Best Auto-Flowering Strains for Anxiety Relief in 2026 –** High CBD (Over 15%), Low THC (Under 1%)
These strains have anti-anxiety properties with subtle mental and physical effects (won’t get you “high”).
  * [**Charlotte’s Angel CBD Auto**](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/charlottes-angel-cbd/ref/63951/) (16% CBD)
  * [**Purple’matic CBD Auto**](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/purplematic-cbd-auto/ref/63951/) (17% CBD)
  * [**Pink Kush CBD Auto**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/pink-kush-cbd-301-auto-feminized-seeds-sman-pink-cbd-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64) (17% CBD)

**Recommended Strains with Relaxing and Uplifting Bud Effects in 2026**
I chose these strains not because they have particularly crazy stats, but because when you grow them, the buds just come out good and tend to be popular at parties.
  * [**Blue Dream Auto**](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/blue-dream-auto/ref/63951/)
  * [**Bubblegum Original Auto**](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/original-bubblegum-auto/ref/63951/)
  * [**Creme de la Chem Auto**](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/creme-de-la-chem-auto/ref/63951/)
  * [**Forbidden Runtz Auto**](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/forbidden-runtz-auto/ref/63951/)
  * [**Gelato Auto**](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/gelato-auto/ref/63951/)
  * [**Strawberry Cheesecake Auto**](https://www.seedsman.com/us-en/strawberry-cheesecake-auto-feminized-seeds-sman-strchcake-auto-fem?a_aid=536dc52ef2d64)
  * [**Zkittlez Auto**](https://seedsupreme.com/zkittlez-autoflower.html#grower)

This [Creme de la Chem Auto](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/product/creme-de-la-chem-auto/ref/63951/) plants I grew stayed small and were easy to grow, but I most loved the ultra chill effects.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/creme-de-la-chem-purple-bud-ball-just-before-harvest.jpg)
Here’s the last [Zkittlez Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/zkittlez-autoflower.html#grower) I grew. A pleasure to grow with excellent yields and dreamy bud effects.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/zkittlez-auto-before-harvest.jpg)
The [Zkittlez Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/zkittlez-autoflower.html#grower) cannabis buds grew big, fat, and sparkly. After harvest, the buds gave a confident high.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/zkittlez-auto-closeup-cola-trichomes.jpg)
I hope that helped give you some ideas on strains to grow. Now it’s time to learn how to grow your auto-flowering seeds so you get great results.
## How to Grow Autoflower Seeds to Perfection
Here are simple directions on how to grow a cannabis auto-flowering plants from seed to harvest.
### 1.) Get auto seeds (recommended strains [above](https://www.growweedeasy.com/2026-guide-to-cannabis-auto-flowering-strains#recommended-auto-flowering-strains-2026))
This one is easy. All auto-flowering plants are started from seeds and any of the choices above will work great. Check out our [seeds page](https://www.growweedeasy.com/seeds) for recommendations on where to buy seeds online.
A main thing to keep in mind when choosing auto-flowering seeds is to look at the breeder information and match the strains for a similar amount of flowering time. Avoid growing “tall’ and “short” strains at the same time. The more similar plants grow to each other, the easier it will be for you. Sometimes [growing different strains together](https://www.growweedeasy.com/growing-different-strains-together) can cause unexpected problems. I tend to get strains that take 9-11 weeks from seed to harvest and grow to a medium size, which means all my plants tend to “play well” with each other.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/spider-farmer-led-grow-tent-with-flash-harvest.jpg)
### 2.) Prepare grow light, grow medium, and autoflower cannabis nutrients
Before you get started growing, you need to make sure your plants have light, nutrients, and a home for their roots.
Not sure what to get? For beginner growers, I recommend getting an [LED grow light](https://www.growweedeasy.com/5-best-led-grow-lights-2025-cannabis-yields-speed-bud-quality), using [soil](https://www.growweedeasy.com/what-soil-is-good-for-growing-cannabis) or [coco](https://www.growweedeasy.com/coco-coir-cannabis-grow-medium) as a grow medium, Dyna-Gro [Foliage-Pro](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B003SUT6VS?tag=growwcom07-20&camp=0&creative=0&linkCode=as4&creativeASIN=B003SUT6VS&adid=08GDKKNQXK25PYQVHZ6Z&) and [Bloom](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B000E1VWZ2/ref=as_li_ss_til?tag=growwcom07-20&camp=0&creative=0&linkCode=as4&creativeASIN=B000E1VWZ2&adid=0VZT8ZFJ0HZCA2XZX9CF&) nutrients (can be used in any grow medium) and choosing a 2, 3, or 5-gallon fabric pot as your [container](https://www.growweedeasy.com/choose-right-pot).
The [Spider Farmer SF-2000](https://www.amazon.com/Spider-Farmer-SF2000-Dimmable-Hydroponics/dp/B07TVD1Y3K?keywords=sf+2000&qid=1686508490&sr=8-1-spons&ufe=app_do%3Aamzn1.fos.c3015c4a-46bb-44b9-81a4-dc28e6d374b3&psc=1&spLa=ZW5jcnlwdGVkUXVhbGlmaWVyPUExM0ZXUVhBUE5LWUpKJmVuY3J5cHRlZElkPUEwNDExMDE2MVFaUzVFNk9XVFpVSyZlbmNyeXB0ZWRBZElkPUEwNTQ4MDAyMzlCS1FGOEc0M1RNTyZ3aWRnZXROYW1lPXNwX2F0ZiZhY3Rpb249Y2xpY2tSZWRpcmVjdCZkb05vdExvZ0NsaWNrPXRydWU%3D&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=53999ddcc02129706c19d7cfff431771&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) is a great 200W LED grow light that doesn’t make much heat and can produce over 10 ounces per harvest ([here’s my review](https://www.growweedeasy.com/my-review-spider-farmer-sf-2000-leds-for-growing-cannabis)).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/spider-farmer-led-grow-tent-with-flash-harvest.jpg)
I personally believe [soil](https://www.growweedeasy.com/what-soil-is-good-for-growing-cannabis) or [coco](https://www.growweedeasy.com/coco-coir) are the best choice for first-time growers. These mediums tend to be more forgiving than [hydroponics](https://www.growweedeasy.com/high-yield-bubbleponics-technique).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/08/fox-farm-ocean-forest-soil.jpg)
[3-gallon fabric pots](https://www.amazon.com/VIVOSUN-Premium-Thichkened-Non-Woven-Aeration/dp/B00TF9E4UO?crid=2EAGTPOZWG9JI&dchild=1&keywords=3+gallon+fabric+pots&qid=1632354127&s=lawn-garden&sprefix=3+gallon+fabric%2Clawngarden%2C206&sr=1-5&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=422abeef2280b1e23b7c218b864afe3c&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) like the ones here let an auto-flowering plant get big enough to produce big yields, but plants usually won’t get much bigger than this.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/315-lec-grow-light-3100k-flowering-bulb.jpg)
Dyna-Gro ([Foliage-Pro](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B003SUT6VS?tag=growwcom07-20&camp=0&creative=0&linkCode=as4&creativeASIN=B003SUT6VS&adid=08GDKKNQXK25PYQVHZ6Z&), [Bloom](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B000E1VWZ2/ref=as_li_ss_til?tag=growwcom07-20&camp=0&creative=0&linkCode=as4&creativeASIN=B000E1VWZ2&adid=0VZT8ZFJ0HZCA2XZX9CF&)) are inexpensive nutrients that work great for growing cannabis in any grow medium including soil, coco, or hydro. Use “Foliage-Pro” during the vegetative stage, and “Bloom” during the flowering stage. Just follow the instructions on the bottle for a great feeding schedule.
​[](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B003SUT6VS?tag=growwcom07-20&camp=0&creative=0&linkCode=as4&creativeASIN=B003SUT6VS&adid=1WXA2TPRJ5GJGYX0N8MP&)[](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B000E1VWZ2/ref=as_li_ss_til?tag=growwcom07-20&camp=0&creative=0&linkCode=as4&creativeASIN=B000E1VWZ2&adid=0VZT8ZFJ0HZCA2XZX9CF&)
[Learn more about what you need to start growing](https://www.growweedeasy.com/10-minute-guide-get-set-up-to-grow-cannabis-indoors).
### 3.) Germinate seeds
Once you get set up, it’s time to start growing. There are many ways to germinate seeds. Here’s [the technique I use](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-germinate-seeds-via-paper-towel-method) to get nearly 100% germination. But at its simplest, you can stick seeds in a pot about half a knuckle deep.
Germinate your autoflowering seeds and you’ll soon have seedlings. Remember, bigger pots let plants get bigger while using small pots or solo cups will keep plants small.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/after-1-week-growth-solo-cup-seedlings-are-falling-behind.jpg)
### 4.) Water autoflower plants with care
For the first few weeks, the idea is to give water to autoflower seedlings when the top starts drying up. Young seedlings only need a little water in a circle around their base at first. Wait until your plants are growing fast before giving enough water to get runoff water out of the bottom.
[Learn how to water autoflower plants perfectly every time](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-often-water-marijuana).
Seedlings only need a few cups of water at first. Notice how we only gave these plants a little water in a circle.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/seedlings-were-just-put-in-pots-and-watered.jpg)
Once cannabis plants are growing fast, you can give them enough water for runoff (remove the runoff immediately). Wait until the top is dry before watering plants again.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/preparing-to-water-the-garden.jpg)
Follow a provent nutrient feeding schedule (made for your particular nutrient system) to maximize plant growth. Younger plants don’t need much nutrients, so you can often get away without giving them at first (if you’re growing in soil, which contains some nutrients already. But once plants start flowering (next step), their nutrient needs go up.
### 5.) Autoflower buds start forming (“flowering stage”)
Autoflower plants naturally enter the flowering stage (buds start forming) after 3-6 weeks, depending on the particular strain (4-5 weeks on average, in my experience).
Autoflower plants start making buds (“enter the flowering stage”) about a month or so from germination, like this [Critical Purple Auto](https://seedsupreme.com/critical-purple-autoflower.html#grower).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/first-purple-pistils-critical-purple-auto-sm.jpg)
Make sure to give your plant “flowering” or “bloom formula” nutrients” (low in Nitrogen, high in Potassium and Phosphorus) once you see fluffy white buds like above.
### 6.) Adjust grow light as needed (watch autoflower plants for stress)
How much light is enough light for autoflower plants?
As plants get taller, raise the light to keep it the recommended distance away from plants. When in doubt, start lights about 24″ away, though many lights can be kept closer.
[How far should I keep my light from my plants?](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-far-grow-lights)
Adjust grow lights as needed to keep them the proper distance from plants as they grow.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/light-distance-flat-led-grow-light.jpg)
Remember, when buds start forming, autoflower plants can handle more light, on average. However, they won’t be growing new leaves nearly as fast, so if plants get too much light it can give them light stress, causing plants and buds to grow slower.
### 7.) Harvest autoflower plants (learn when to harvest)
Buds are ready to harvest when the white hairs have darkened and curled in!
The hairs on buds darken and curl in as buds mature. Buds should look solid by the time they’re ready to harvest.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/ready-to-harvest-ocean-fruit-bud.jpg)
[Here’s the full “When to Harvest” guide](https://www.growweedeasy.com/harvest)
Don’t forget to [dry and cure](https://www.growweedeasy.com/tips-tricks-curing-cannabis) your buds!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/mars-hydro-led-harvest-drying-in-tent.jpg)
Keep the leaves after harvest to turn into [edibles or hash](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-make-cannabis-extracts-edibles)!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/harvest-in-jars-plus-trim.jpg)
### 7.) Enjoy your weed!
You earned it.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/sour-diesel-auto-nug.jpg)
[](https://www.instagram.com/growweedeasy/)

GrowWeedEasy.com was [founded in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
